'''galudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mlechchha|mlechchha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mlechchha|mlechchha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| galudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gælidhith|gælidhith]] || [[word:gælidhij|gælidhij]] || [[word:gælidhish|gælidhish]] || [[word:gælidhi|gælidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:galuludhuth|galuludhuth]] || [[word:galuludhuj|galuludhuj]] || [[word:galuludhush|galuludhush]] || [[word:galuludhu|galuludhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:galudhuth|galudhuth]] || [[word:galudhuj|galudhuj]] || [[word:galudhush|galudhush]] || [[word:galudhu|galudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:galufdhuth|galufdhuth]] || [[word:galufdhuj|galufdhuj]] || [[word:galufdhush|galufdhush]] || [[word:galufdhuf|galufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:galudhuthu|galudhuthu]] || [[word:galudhuju|galudhuju]] || [[word:galudhushu|galudhushu]] || [[word:galudhuku|galudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:galudhuth|galudhuth]] || [[word:galudhuj|galudhuj]] || [[word:galudhush|galudhush]] || [[word:galudhu|galudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:galudhuthul|galudhuthul]] || [[word:galudhujul|galudhujul]] || [[word:galudhushul|galudhushul]] || [[word:galudhukul|galudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:galudhuthuthu|galudhuthuthu]] || [[word:galudhujuju|galudhujuju]] || [[word:galudhushushu|galudhushushu]] || [[word:galudhuku|galudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:galudhuthun|galudhuthun]] || [[word:galudhujun|galudhujun]] || [[word:galudhushun|galudhushun]] || [[word:galudhukun|galudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:galudhuthuoro|galudhuthuoro]] || [[word:galudhujuoro|galudhujuoro]] || [[word:galudhushuoro|galudhushuoro]] || [[word:galudhukuoro|galudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
